title: virtuoso-t crash when entering with some sql
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64 DEFAULT generateUUIDv4(), name String NOT NULL, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN description String;
INSERT INTO test_table (name, description) VALUES ('Test Entry', NULL);
ALTER TABLE test_table DROP COLUMN id;
key_bug_features: Dropping column after creating sequence causes crash
